title: Project: Mist
desc: Join the Project Mist in this new open world survival horror. Explore an enigmatic Island. Fight against colossal monsters. Build and defend your base while crafting traps, siege weapons, upgrading your gear and Gravity Gun. Survive or perish while unraveling the secrets behind the giant wall!

title: Rune Dice
desc: Throw dice, create explosive chain reactions, and defeat waves of enemies in Rune Dice! Collect ancient runes with diverse abilities, add synergies between relics, heroes, and special dice. All combined, this will give you an excellent experience in our roguelike deckbuilder.

title: Forza Horizon 6
desc: Discover the breathtaking landscapes of Japan in over 550 real-world cars and become a racing Legend at the Horizon Festival. Start your journey as a tourist and explore a world full of hit music and Japanese culture. Build a Valley Estate, acquire awe-inspiring homes, and display your prized car collection in fully Customizable Garages. Cruise the roads with your friends and join Car Meets around Japan, unleash your imagination with EventLab and build together in Horizon CoLab.

title: Winnie-the-Pooh Hops for Honey
desc: Uh oh. Winnie-the-Pooh ate all of the honey that Christopher Robin set aside for the annual Honey Festival! It's up to Winnie to set things right and prove that his heart is bigger than his stomach by adventuring into the Hundred Acre Wood to collect enough honey to save the festival!

title: R-Type Dimensions III
desc: Building on the legacy of R-Type Dimensions and R-Type Dimensions EX, Dimensions III has been completely re-envisioned with cutting-edge visuals and sounds, expanded gameplay modes, and a range of new features designed to deliver the most definitive modern edition of R-Type’s classic era.

title: Forza Horizon 6: Deluxe Edition
desc: Forza Horizon 6 Deluxe Edition includes the full game, Welcome Pack and Car Pass (30 cars delivered to your game, one per week).

title: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Deluxe Edition
desc:
Includes:
• Full Base Game
• Legacy Collection:
- Over 30 launch-day items included across 3 Themed Packs: Arkham Trilogy Pack, Batman Beyond Pack, Party Music Pack
- Each Themed Pack includes 7 suits (1 for each playable character), 1 Batmobile, and a set of 5 Batcave customization props
- 3-day Advanced Access

• Mayhem Collection*:
- Includes new Story Mission and Mayhem Mode featuring The Joker and Harley Quinn, along with a villain-themed Sinister Pack
- Break out of Arkham Asylum as playable characters The Joker and Harley Quinn in an all-new Story Mission
- Cause chaos on the streets of Gotham City in the all-new Mayhem Mode
- Sinister Pack includes 7 suits (1 for each of the original playable characters), 1 Batmobile, and 1 Batcave prop set

title: Caravan Village: Farming Life
desc: Turn a scam into an empire! In Caravan Village, farm crops, raise animals, mine for resources, and renovate abandoned caravans into luxury suites. Recover your grandma's lost cookbook, cook delicious meals, and charm your guests in this open-ended life RPG. Create your own vacation paradise!

title: Pix Football Manager
desc: PIX Football Manager is a nostalgic, casual football management simulator focused on scouting. Set your tactics, find hidden gems, and improve your facilities as you build a dynasty. With no visible player stats, you must spot talent yourself. Grab your clipboard, the game starts now.

title: Farming Simulator 26: Nintendo Switch Edition
desc: Rise to the Challenge of Farming!

title: Girls’ Dorm: Managing an All-Girls’ Dormitory
desc: Managing a dormitory is hard work—especially when its residents are all girls! Does Haruto have what it takes to deal with this garden of flowers?

title: Girls’ Dorm: Managing an All-Girls’ Dormitory - After
desc: The story isn't over yet! This sequel to Girls' Dorm follows the daily lives of this troublesome trio at Sakuraba Girls' Academy.

title: Dune: Awakening - The Water Wars DLC
desc: The Water Wars DLC features a cosmetic pack inspired by the Water Shippers and their cartel. Customize your base with 52 building pieces and 18 decorations and feel the aura of the Water Shippers with their armor, weapons, an ornithopter variant, a cosmetic swatch, and 2 emotes.

title: Marine.exe: Desktop RPG
desc: Marine.exe is a desktop overlay AFK RPG that transforms your screen into a sci-fi combat zone. Watch your elite marine squad battle alien hordes while you work, browse, or play other games.

title: Forza Horizon 6: Welcome Pack
desc: Discover Japan with everything you need to get started and accelerate your racing journey to Horizon Legend with the Forza Horizon 6 Welcome Pack.

title: Forza Horizon 6: VIP Membership
desc: Forza Horizon 6 VIP Membership is your permanent ticket to even more rewards at the Horizon Festival. Enjoy a 2x Credit boost to race rewards, 3 VIP-Exclusive Forza Edition cars, a weekly bonus Super Wheelspin, and special Vanity Items including the Crown Flair, Emote and Car Horn. You’ll also be handed the keys to the lavish Tokyo City House, a classic Japanese home in the suburbs that includes a Customizable Garage with a space to show off your favorite cars. Forza Horizon 6 VIP Membership can be purchased separately and is included with Premium Edition and Premium Upgrade. This lifetime membership is a single purchase and will always be yours to enjoy in Forza Horizon 6. Join the Horizon VIP Club today!

title: Forza Horizon 6: Time Attack Car Pack
desc: Break lap records with 8 legendary cars ideal for mastering every turn and corner at the Time Attack Circuits located around Japan.
